full_jd_text:
FOUNDER'S ASSOCIATE — LETTY | London (Hoxton, 5 days in-office) | £55-75K + Equity | Start: March/April 2026

OVERVIEW
Be the operational backbone of the company, working directly alongside the CEO. You'll get a front-row seat building a venture-backed company from the ground up. Join Letty as employee #1 / first full-time hire and turn chaos into order by building the company's operational, financial, and hiring infrastructure from scratch. A high-octane execution seat for a relentlessly resourceful operator ready to scale a global platform from Hoxton.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Operations & Company Building:
- Build the operational infrastructure of a scaling startup from scratch; tools, processes, documentation, reporting.
- Company operations: contracts, insurance, filings, onboarding documentation, vendor management.
- Be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks as the team grows.

Hiring & People:
- Run the end-to-end recruitment process for engineering and commercial roles — sourcing, screening, external provider management, offer coordination.
- Build the hiring infrastructure: interview processes, candidate pipelines.
- Own early-stage people ops as the team grows: onboarding, culture, making Letty a place top talent wants to join.

Finance & Legal:
- Coordinate payroll and accounting with exterior providers.
- Liaise with lawyers on commercial contracts, employment law, IP, and corporate matters.
- Keep the financial and legal house in order so the founders can focus on product and customers.

CEO Support & Strategy:
- Be a thought partner on strategic decisions: market entry, pricing, partnerships, hiring priorities.
- Research, analyse, and build the materials that support key business decisions.
- Represent the company externally in emails, calls, meetings, and conferences when needed.

GTM Function Building:
- Investor relations & fundraising support.
- Prepare board materials and keep investor relationships warm between rounds.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS (MUST-HAVES)
- Ex-founder, Chief of Staff, Founder's Associate, or early startup ops experience (approx. 2-4 years), thriving in high-agency, execution-heavy environments.
- Obsessively organised with an ability to manage 20 things at once without dropping any / without letting details slip across finance, legal, and operations.
- Strong written communication; relentlessly resourceful communicator with a strong academic background who prefers building from scratch.
- Low ego, high standards. No task is beneath you.
- Based in London with the ability to work in-person in Hoxton 5 days a week. No working from home possible.

NICE-TO-HAVES
- Consulting, investment banking, or prior startup experience.
- Experience hiring technical talent (engineers, ML/AI roles).
- Interest in real estate and AI.

COMPENSATION & LOGISTICS
- £55-75K base + Equity.
- Location: London (Hoxton), 5 days in-office; no remote/WFH. UK customer travel.
- Start date: March/April 2026.

APPLICATION PROCESS
- Distributed via the Jack & Jill recruiting board (boutique, human/founder-curated). 'Apply now' button on the listing; mirrors offer a CV-tailoring tool. No Letty-owned ATS or careers page exists; founder-outreach (CEO Adi Edekar) is the alternative direct route.

ABOUT LETTY
Letty will be the last-ever real estate agent: a series of fully automated, agentic-AI-driven end-to-end real estate employees to radically transform how homes are rented and sold around the world — handling tenant engagement, landlord services, compliance, and maintenance. Letty has raised over $5.5M USD from top-tier VCs, is backed by Entrepreneurs First, and is live in agencies across the UK with early US traction.
